categories.label: Points from Workers
categories.description: Victory points earned from worker cards during worker phase scoring (most workers earn only money, but some upgraded workers earn points too)

categories.label: Points from Buildings
categories.description: Victory points earned from building cards during building phase scoring throughout the game

categories.label: Points from Aristocrats
categories.description: Victory points earned from aristocrat cards during aristocrat phase scoring throughout the game

categories.label: Aristocrat Diversity Bonus
categories.description: End-game bonus points for having different aristocrats (1=0, 2=1, 3=3, 4=6, 5=10, 6=15, 7=21, 8=28, 9=36, 10=45)

categories.label: Leftover Money
categories.description: 1 point per full 10 rubles remaining at end of game

categories.label: Cards in Hand
categories.description: -5 points per card remaining in hand at end of game
